tools.name: root.deleteObject
tools.description: Deletes an object at the specified path.

tools.name: root.describeObject
tools.description: Gets the headers for an object at the specified path.

tools.name: root.getObject
tools.description: Downloads the object at the specified path. If the object’s upload availability is set to streaming, AWS Elemental MediaStore downloads the object even if it’s still uploading the object.

tools.name: root.listItems
tools.description: Provides a list of metadata entries about folders and objects in the specified folder.

tools.name: root.putObject
tools.description: Uploads an object to the specified path. Object sizes are limited to 25 MB for standard upload availability and 10 MB for streaming upload availability.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
